overview: An interactive educational website about nuclear science and engineering. Covers atoms, radioactivity, nuclear reactions, reactor types, radiation, and applications — with 3D visualizations, animated simulations, and audience-tailored content for everyone from curious beginners to nuclear engineers.
features: Nucleus Visualizer — interactive 3D model with proton/neutron sliders
Decay Chain Explorer — animated D3 graph tracing U-238 decay to Pb-206
Chart of Nuclides — color-coded heatmap of 50+ key nuclides
Reactor Cross-Section — animated SVG with control rod slider
Multi-level content — beginner through professional audience paths
Dark mode default with WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility
